summary: The diff successfully implements all four requirements from the BuildRequest. The Complete Assessment button handler in Section4.tsx was fixed with proper click handling, loading states, and error handling. Assessment data submission to the Motoko backend via actor.submitAssessment() is implemented with proper data transformation. Successful navigation to the results page is handled after submission. Admin dashboard queries are configured to automatically refresh and display newly submitted assessments. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed in the implementation.

hallucinated_features.description: Toast notification system using 'sonner' library for error messages
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not mention adding toast notifications or any user feedback mechanism beyond loading states
While not harmful, extensive console.log statements were added for debugging purposes which were not requested in the BuildRequest

hallucinated_features.description: Query caching and staleTime/gcTime configuration for admin dashboard queries
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest specifies 'Data refresh shows newly submitted assessments without page reload' but does not request specific cache timing configurations (30 seconds staleTime, 5 minutes gcTime)
